description: Parameter robustness sweep for the recommended mechanism (both-dynamic-strict-threshold, window 5). Lockstep grid over targetUtilisation {0.25, 0.5, 0.75} x maxChangeDenominator {4, 8, 16} on both controllers, with ebThresholdBytes derived per point from (1 - targetUtilisation) x rbTxBytesCap; the tu50-d8 anchor is the existing recommended config. Two isolation variants pin the threshold at RB/2 (45056 B) while the controller moves off-default, separating mechanism robustness from the threshold formula's contribution. Run once per load profile (low preset, severe-congestion, launch-day) with matching --out directories
